---
title: "ChatR Skills: Modular R Assistance Through Reusable Skills and MCP-Wrapped Tool"
author:
  - name: "Hanxia Li"
    affiliations:
      - "Georgia Institute of Technology"
  - name: "Michael Lawrence"
    affiliations:
      - "R Core"
      - "Genentech"

date: today
date-format: iso
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
  hikmah-pdf:
    geometry:
      - left=1.25in
      - right=1.25in
bibliography: references.bib
---

{{< include proposal/00-exec-summary.qmd >}}

{{< include proposal/01-signatories.qmd >}}

{{< include proposal/02-problemdefinition.qmd >}}

{{< include proposal/03-proposal.qmd >}}

{{< include proposal/04-timeline.qmd >}}

{{< include proposal/05-success.qmd >}}

::: refs
:::
